title: BEM-664 file smoke msg
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
queue=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue'); queue.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

renderer=scripts/'render_telegram_send_smoke_message.py'
renderer.write_text(sep.join([
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'OUT = Path("governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_message.txt")',
'OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'OUT.write_text("BEM-664 | TELEGRAM DELIVERY SMOKE | workflow_runtime" + SEP + SEP + "Проверка доставки Telegram из GitHub Actions. Если это сообщение получено, bot/chat secrets and sendMessage path work." + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'print(str(OUT))'
])+sep)

wf=wfs/'telegram-send-smoke.yml'
wf.write_text('''name: Telegram Send Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/telegram_send_smoke.trigger'
      - 'scripts/render_telegram_send_smoke_message.py'
      - 'scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py'
      - '.github/workflows/telegram-send-smoke.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: telegram-send-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  telegram-send-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check smoke scripts
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/render_telegram_send_smoke_message.py scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py

      - name: Render smoke message
        run: python3 scripts/render_telegram_send_smoke_message.py

      - name: Send Telegram smoke message
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/tmp
          if [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ] || [ -z "$TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt
            printf '{"ok":false,"description":"missing secret"}' > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_response.json
          elif [ ! -s governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_message.txt ]; then
            echo "not_sent_empty_message" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt
            printf '{"ok":false,"description":"empty message"}' > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_response.json
          else
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_response.json -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage" --data-urlencode "chat_id=${TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID}" --data-urlencode "text@governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_message.txt" --data-urlencode "disable_web_page_preview=true" || echo "000")
            if [ "$HTTP_CODE" = "200" ]; then echo "sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt; else echo "not_sent_http_${HTTP_CODE}" > governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_status.txt; fi
          fi

      - name: Record Telegram smoke result
        run: python3 scripts/record_telegram_send_smoke.py

      - name: Commit telegram smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json governance/reports/telegram_send_smoke_result.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-664 telegram send smoke result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

# Queue explicit dispatches instead of relying on push recursion.
items={
 'telegram_send_smoke':{'workflow':'telegram-send-smoke.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{}},
 'curator_hourly_report':{'workflow':'curator-hourly-report.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{}},
 'curator_hourly_delivery_verification':{'workflow':'curator-hourly-delivery-verification.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{}}
}
queue_files=[]
for name,data in items.items():
    p=queue/(name+'.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    queue_files.append(str(p))

text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
checks=[
 {'name':'workflow_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'renderer_exists','pass':renderer.exists(),'evidence':str(renderer)},
 {'name':'no_heredoc','pass':'<<' not in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'no_shell_ansi_c_string','pass':"$'" not in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'uses_text_file_upload','pass':'text@governance/tmp/telegram_send_smoke_message.txt' in text,'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'queue_items_created','pass':all(Path(f).exists() for f in queue_files),'evidence':str(queue)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='pass' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if status=='pass' else {'code':'TELEGRAM_SMOKE_FILE_MESSAGE_PATCH_FAILED','failed':failed}
protocol=protocols/'TELEGRAM_SMOKE_FILE_BASED_MESSAGE.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-664 | Telegram Smoke File-Based Message'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:59 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Telegram smoke workflow sends a pre-rendered message file with curl `text@file`. This avoids YAML breakage from heredoc and inline multiline shell strings.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'telegram_smoke_file_based_message.v1','bem':'BEM-664','status':status,'checks':checks,'workflow':str(wf),'renderer':str(renderer),'queue_files':queue_files,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:59 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem664_telegram_smoke_file_based_message.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem664_telegram_smoke_file_based_message.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-664 | Telegram Smoke File-Based Message | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:59 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Queue files'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+f for f in queue_files])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem664_telegram_smoke_file_based_message','cycle_id':'bem664-telegram-smoke-file-based-message','source':'executor','status':status,'queue_files':queue_files,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:59 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem664_telegram_smoke_file_based_message']={'status':status,'state_file':str(state_file),'workflow':str(wf),'renderer':str(renderer),'queue_files':queue_files,'blocker':blocker}
contour_state['telegram_delivery_repair_status']='file_based_smoke_dispatch_queued'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:59 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem664_telegram_smoke_file_based_message.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-664 '+status.upper()+': Telegram smoke workflow now uses file-based message and dispatch queue items.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(renderer),str(wf),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)]+queue_files)
ops_applied.append('Rebuilt Telegram smoke workflow to use file-based message, avoiding YAML heredoc/inline multiline risks, and queued explicit dispatches')
"""
No issue comments.
